title: Object to a decision
description: When and how to object to decisions we make about your tax affairs, and which decisions you can object to.
keywords: adjustment, amendment, decision, dispute, objection,  remission, review, dispute assist

child_links.title: Steps to lodge an objection
child_links.description: Follow this step-by-step checklist to object to an ATO decision.

child_links.title: Eligibility to lodge an objection
child_links.description: Confirm you're eligible to lodge an objection.

child_links.title: What to include in your objection
child_links.description: Information you need to provide to help us process your objection faster.

child_links.title: Complete and lodge your objection
child_links.description: How to lodge an objection to an ATO decision. There is no fee to lodge.

child_links.title: How we manage your objection
child_links.description: How we engage with you when processing your objection, and our responsibilities.

child_links.title: Dispute Assist
child_links.description: Dispute Assist is a free service that helps vulnerable individuals and small businesses with the objection process.
